title: evolvulus phyllanthoides
intro: Evolvulus phyllanthoides, also known as the dwarf morning glory or creeping evolvulus, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions in South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Evolvulus phyllanthoides can be used to create infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
